caption: A woman is captured in a close-up shot, positioned in front of light-colored curtains. She has dark hair and is wearing a striped, button-down shirt and a black headset with a microphone extending toward her mouth. The on-screen text "Nancy Ramya" is visible in the bottom-left corner of each shot. Throughout the sequence, the woman remains in a stationary position, facing the camera. Her expression is neutral as she speaks, with her mouth opening and closing slightly across the frames. The background and her attire remain consistent, with no significant changes in lighting or location. She does not interact with anyone else, as she is the sole person visible in the frames.
